pageContext.name: Batman #118 Todd McFarlane Spider-Man Homage Variant
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Dynamic Forces are excited to present the Batman #118 Todd McFarlene Spider-Man Homage Variant CGC Graded Comic Book!  New creative team! Start of a new story arc as Batman leaves Gotham. 'Abyss' part one! As Gotham celebrates surviving Fear State, Batman retreats alone into the darkness, but when he learns of a mystery involving Batman Inc, it forces the Caped Crusader to leave Gotham for a brand-new adventure!  Thrills, chills, and international intrigue await! The Dark Knight begins a new story with superstar artist Jorge Molina and new writer Joshua Williamson! CGC GRADED 9.6 OR HIGHER!   Don't miss your chance to add this comic book to your DC Comics collection today!
